queries.sql:
SELECT COUNT(o.o_orderkey), COUNT(c.c_custkey)
FROM tpch_sf1.orders AS o
FULL JOIN tpch_sf1.customer AS c
  ON o.o_custkey = c.c_custkey;

theorem.description: Count rows after FULL JOIN from ORDERS to CUSTOMER
theorem.name: PLAN_JOIN_CHECK-FULL-ORDERS-CUSTOMER
